name: choice-properties
description: Static site. Deployed via Cloudflare Pages (GitHub push triggers auto-deploy). No local server. No backend. Backend = Supabase cloud.

scripts.start:
node -e "console.error('
ERROR: This project does not run locally.
The only deployment path is: edit files → push to GitHub → Cloudflare Pages auto-deploys.
Do not configure a local server, workflow, or preview in Replit.
'); process.exit(1)"
